'''鈭歽-s-th''' ('''kayasath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeolitize|zeolitize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-s-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeolitize|zeolitize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-s-th
|-
! Lemma
| kayasath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyasath|thiyasath]] || [[word:jiyasath|jiyasath]] || [[word:shiyasath|shiyasath]] || [[word:kiyasath|kiyasath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyasath|thuthuyasath]] || [[word:jujuyasath|jujuyasath]] || [[word:shushuyasath|shushuyasath]] || [[word:kukuyasath|kukuyasath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyasath|thuyasath]] || [[word:juyasath|juyasath]] || [[word:shuyasath|shuyasath]] || [[word:kuyasath|kuyasath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyasath|thuyasath]] || [[word:juyasath|juyasath]] || [[word:shuyasath|shuyasath]] || [[word:kuyasath|kuyasath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyasath|theyasath]] || [[word:jeyasath|jeyasath]] || [[word:sheyasath|sheyasath]] || [[word:keyasath|keyasath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyasath|thothoyasath]] || [[word:jojoyasath|jojoyasath]] || [[word:shoshoyasath|shoshoyasath]] || [[word:kokoyasath|kokoyasath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyasath|thoyasath]] || [[word:joyasath|joyasath]] || [[word:shoyasath|shoyasath]] || [[word:koyasath|koyasath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyasath|thoyasath]] || [[word:joyasath|joyasath]] || [[word:shoyasath|shoyasath]] || [[word:koyasath|koyasath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yasath|yasath]] || [[word:yasath|yasath]] || [[word:yasath|yasath]] || [[word:yasath|yasath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasath|yasath]] || [[word:yasath|yasath]] || [[word:yasath|yasath]] || [[word:yasath|yasath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasath|yasath]] || [[word:yasath|yasath]] || [[word:yasath|yasath]] || [[word:yasath|yasath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasath|yasath]] || [[word:yasath|yasath]] || [[word:yasath|yasath]] || [[word:yasath|yasath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yasath|th忙yasath]] || [[word:j忙yasath|j忙yasath]] || [[word:sh忙yasath|sh忙yasath]] || [[word:k忙yasath|k忙yasath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayasath|thathayasath]] || [[word:jajayasath|jajayasath]] || [[word:shashayasath|shashayasath]] || [[word:kakayasath|kakayasath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayasath|thayasath]] || [[word:jayasath|jayasath]] || [[word:shayasath|shayasath]] || [[word:kayasath|kayasath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayasath|thayasath]] || [[word:jayasath|jayasath]] || [[word:shayasath|shayasath]] || [[word:kayasath|kayasath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayasath|shayasath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayasath|goshayasath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayasath|gokishayasath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayasathn眉|shayasathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayasathnkn眉|goshayasathnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayasathn眉|gokishayasathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayasathsh毛|shayasathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayasathnksh毛|goshayasathnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayasathsh毛|gokishayasathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayasathro|shayasathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayasathnkro|goshayasathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayasathro|gokishayasathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayasathmu|shayasathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayasathnkmu|goshayasathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayasathmu|gokishayasathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayasathsher|shayasathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayasathnksher|goshayasathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayasathsher|gokishayasathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayasathng|shayasathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayasathnkng|goshayasathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayasathng|gokishayasathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayasathya|shayasathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayasathnkya|goshayasathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayasathya|gokishayasathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayasathyam|shayasathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayasathnkyam|goshayasathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayasathyam|gokishayasathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayasathn眉sh毛|shayasathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayasathnkn眉sh毛|goshayasathnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayasathn眉sh毛|gokishayasathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayasathn眉ro|shayasathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayasathnkn眉ro|goshayasathnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayasathn眉ro|gokishayasathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayasathn眉mu|shayasathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayasathnkn眉mu|goshayasathnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayasathn眉mu|gokishayasathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayasathsh毛n眉|shayasathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayasathnksh毛n眉|goshayasathnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayasathsh毛n眉|gokishayasathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayasathsh毛ro|shayasathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayasathnksh毛ro|goshayasathnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayasathsh毛ro|gokishayasathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayasathsh毛mu|shayasathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayasathnksh毛mu|goshayasathnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayasathsh毛mu|gokishayasathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayasathron眉|shayasathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayasathnkron眉|goshayasathnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayasathron眉|gokishayasathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayasathrosh毛|shayasathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayasathnkrosh毛|goshayasathnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayasathrosh毛|gokishayasathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayasathromu|shayasathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayasathnkromu|goshayasathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayasathromu|gokishayasathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayasathmun眉|shayasathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayasathnkmun眉|goshayasathnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayasathmun眉|gokishayasathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayasathmush毛|shayasathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayasathnkmush毛|goshayasathnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayasathmush毛|gokishayasathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayasathmuro|shayasathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayasathnkmuro|goshayasathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayasathmuro|gokishayasathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
